Operation 'deleteIndividual' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is extremely vague and provides no context about what deletion entails or its effects. AI agents need to understand: (1) what resource is being deleted, (2) what parameters are required, (3) what the operation returns, (4) potential side effects (impact on related onboarding jobs). Enhanced version clarifies the permanent nature of deletion and warns about cascading effects, helping agents determine if this operation is appropriate for their use case.

data.current_description: Delete an individual.
data.description_suggestion: Deletes an individual record from the onboarding system. Requires the individual's ID as a path parameter. This operation permanently removes the individual and associated registration data. Returns a success confirmation. Note: Deletion may affect any pending or completed onboarding jobs associated with this individual.
data.reasoning: Original description is extremely vague and provides no context about what deletion entails or its effects. AI agents need to understand: (1) what resource is being deleted, (2) what parameters are required, (3) what the operation returns, (4) potential side effects (impact on related onboarding jobs). Enhanced version clarifies the permanent nature of deletion and warns about cascading effects, helping agents determine if this operation is appropriate for their use case.

message: Operation 'getOnboardingJobStatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear and action-oriented. However, description lacks specificity about what status information is returned and the practical use case. Enhanced description clarifies the return value structure (status, progress, results), explains the monitoring purpose, and helps AI agents understand when to call this operation (e.g., after submitting an onboarding request to check progress).

data.current_description: Get the status of an onboarding job.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current status of an onboarding job by its ID. Returns job status information including completion state, progress details, and any validation or processing results. Use this operation to monitor the progress of company or individual registration submissions and identify any issues requiring attention.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. However, description lacks specificity about what status information is returned and the practical use case. Enhanced description clarifies the return value structure (status, progress, results), explains the monitoring purpose, and helps AI agents understand when to call this operation (e.g., after submitting an onboarding request to check progress).

message: Operation 'getsinglevalidation' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate, but description lacks specificity about what data is returned. Added information about the response structure (ValidationResponse) and the types of data included (validation status, compliance information, errors/warnings) to improve AI agent interpretability and help agents understand what information they can extract from this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieves the results of a previously submitted tax ID validation.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the validation results for a previously submitted tax ID validation request. Returns the ValidationResponse containing the TIN validation status, compliance information, and any validation errors or warnings.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks specificity about what data is returned. Added information about the response structure (ValidationResponse) and the types of data included (validation status, compliance information, errors/warnings) to improve AI agent interpretability and help agents understand what information they can extract from this operation.

message: Operation 'deletesinglevalidation' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects. Description is too minimal and lacks important context about permanence and side effects. Added clarification that this is a permanent deletion, cannot be undone, and requires the validation ID. This helps AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation and when it should be used.

data.current_description: Removes a validation result.
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a single tax ID validation record and its associated results. This operation permanently removes the validation from the system and cannot be undone. Requires the validation ID as a path parameter.
data.reasoning: Description is too minimal and lacks important context about permanence and side effects. Added clarification that this is a permanent deletion, cannot be undone, and requires the validation ID. This helps AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation and when it should be used.

message: Operation 'getbatchvalidation' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate, but description lacks specificity about response structure and content. Added information about BatchValidationResponse structure, per-TIN validation status, processing progress, and error handling to help AI agents understand what data is available and how to interpret batch results.

data.current_description: Retrieves the results of a previously submitted batch validation.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the results of a previously submitted batch tax ID validation. Returns the BatchValidationResponse containing validation status for each TIN in the batch, processing progress, and any individual validation errors or warnings.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks specificity about response structure and content. Added information about BatchValidationResponse structure, per-TIN validation status, processing progress, and error handling to help AI agents understand what data is available and how to interpret batch results.

message: Operation 'deletebatchvalidation' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects. Description is too minimal and lacks important context about permanence and scope of deletion. Added clarification that deletion is permanent, affects the entire batch, cannot be undone, and requires the batch ID. This helps AI agents understand the destructive scope of this operation.

data.current_description: Removes a batch validation and its results.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a batch tax ID validation record and all associated validation results. This operation cannot be undone and removes the entire batch from the system. Requires the batch validation ID as a path parameter.
data.reasoning: Description is too minimal and lacks important context about permanence and scope of deletion. Added clarification that deletion is permanent, affects the entire batch, cannot be undone, and requires the batch ID. This helps AI agents understand the destructive scope of this operation.

message: Operation 'cancelbatchvalidation' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects, missing_output_details. Description lacks important details about what happens to processed vs. unprocessed items, the response, and state constraints. Added clarification about partial completion handling, return value, and status requirements to help AI agents understand the operation's effects and when it can be successfully invoked.

data.current_description: Cancels a batch validation that is currently in progress.
data.description_suggestion: Cancels a batch tax ID validation that is currently in progress. Stops further processing of remaining items in the batch. Already processed validations are retained, but unprocessed items will not be validated. Returns the updated batch status. This operation is only valid for batches with 'processing' or 'pending' status.
data.reasoning: Description lacks important details about what happens to processed vs. unprocessed items, the response, and state constraints. Added clarification about partial completion handling, return value, and status requirements to help AI agents understand the operation's effects and when it can be successfully invoked.

message: Operation 'calculateTaxRates' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too minimal. Added clarity on what inputs are expected (transaction details, jurisdictions), what is returned (tax rates, percentages, breakdown), and the operational context (pre-submission calculation). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation in tax compliance workflows.

data.current_description: Request a tax calculation.
data.summary_suggestion: Calculate applicable tax rates for transaction
